logout_message: Are you sure you want to log out?
faq_q1: How do I add a transaction?
faq_a1: Open the "Transaction" tab and tap the '+' button at the bottom right. Fill in the transaction details such as amount, category, and notes, then save.
faq_q2: How do I set a financial target?
faq_a2: Open the "Target" tab and tap '+' to create a new target. Set the target name, amount to achieve, and deadline.
faq_a3: Yes, your data is stored locally on your device. You can also enable additional security through the Security menu in My Profile.
faq_q4: How do I change my password?
faq_a4: Go to My Profile → Security → Change Password. Enter your old password and new password.
faq_q5: How do I export financial reports?
faq_a5: The export report feature is under development and will be available in the next update.

contact_no_email_app: No email app found on your device.
rate_app_desc: Share your experience on the store
clear_cache_message: Clearing cache will free up storage space. Your account data and transactions will not be affected.
profitly_desc: Profitly is a personal finance management app that helps you track expenses, plan savings, and achieve your financial targets.
